title: Audit and fix CLV methodology — exclude opening-line fallbacks from weight tuning

verification.r_level_check: PASS — no R-level artifacts required (Changed files: 2, Rules matched: none)

changes.description: Added isOpeningLineFallback?: boolean to ScoredPickOutcome interface. Added openingLineFallbacksExcluded: number to WeightEffectivenessReport. Updated analyzeWeightEffectiveness() to filter opening-line fallback rows before computing Pearson correlations.
Added WithClosingSource interface and assertClosingSourcePresent() guard function after MIN_CLV_SAMPLE constant. Callers can use this to fail-closed when feeding data to CLV analysis.
Added 3 tests for opening-line fallback exclusion: mixed closing+fallback rows (sampleSize=30, excluded=10), all closing rows (excluded=0), all fallback rows (sampleSize=0, confidence=insufficient).

Added 5 tests for assertClosingSourcePresent(): valid records (no throw), null closingSnapshotAt (throws), null closingProviderKey (throws), multiple missing records (count in message), empty array (no throw).

audit_findings.finding: clv-weight-tuner.ts accepted ScoredPickOutcome rows without checking isOpeningLineFallback
audit_findings.disposition: fixed — opening-line fallbacks filtered before Pearson correlation computation

audit_findings.finding: clv-analyzer.ts had no guard for callers passing records without closing-line provenance
audit_findings.disposition: fixed — assertClosingSourcePresent() added as fail-closed guard

audit_findings.finding: Settlement CLV path in apps/api/src/clv-service.ts confirmed as TRUE CLOSING-LINE (closingSnapshotAt + providerKey), with isOpeningLineFallback: true on fallbacks
audit_findings.disposition: confirmed correct — no change needed in clv-service.ts

test_db_evidence.summary: All live-DB smoke tests passed against real Supabase (project ref: zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm)
